issues.description: First effect misses the core prevention mechanic. Text says 'this Character would be removed from the field, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead' — this is a replacement effect that prevents removal, not a triggered draw on OnAttacked. Should use a Counter trigger with a condition checking if this card would be removed, and action should prevent removal while allowing trash as alternative.
Condition checks board state but doesn't validate Leader type. Should be 'LeaderHasType':'Navy' not 'HasCardOnBoard':'Navy'.

Text specifies '[Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When your opponent's Character is K.O.'d' — the trigger should be OnKO but requires duration constraint. Missing duration:'DuringYourTurn' (not just a simple OnKO which would also trigger during opponent's turn).
Missing condition to specify 'opponent's Character' is K.O.'d (not your own). Needs clarification in effect scope.
